text: The descent of Elcana from Caath bears several resemblances to the tree given in verses 22-27; and they may be two accounts of the same genealogy, differing either through imperfect manuscript transmission or through a confusion between natural and adopted sons (cf. note on Mt. 1.16).
The original has ‘which they called by their names’, but see Jos. 21.9, of which this verse is evidently a repetition.
